room.caption: [CCityNorthHouseA] This is an important house.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=112 newMapY=288 toRoom=rHPF_A colorChange=1 depth=1000000 if global.gameProgress<=3910 {instance_destroy()}

boxSize=2 stringToShow="The computer system down there has a lot of defenses to keep out intruders, which luckily will see you as an ally." image_xscale=-1
if global.gameProgress<=3910 or global.gameProgress>=4190 {instance_destroy()}

npcTag=10 sprite_index=sNPC_John_Idle image_speed=0.2 image_xscale=-1
if global.gameProgress<=3910 or global.gameProgress>=4940 {instance_destroy()}
GID_SET(134496, self.id) image_xscale=20 image_yscale=13 if global.gameProgress>=3930 {instance_destroy()}
